# CrosswordSolver

CrosswordSolver publishes static daily crossword answer pages and a user-operated archive lookup.

Important pages:
- Home: https://crosswordsolver.dev/
- Archive: https://crosswordsolver.dev/archive
- Solver: https://crosswordsolver.dev/crossword-solver

API endpoints are not intended for crawling, indexing, training, or bulk extraction. Use the static pages for citation and discovery.
